WITN08530100
WITN08530100

90. I can confirm that I was not involved in any prosecutions / criminal cases.

91. I have been asked what (if any) recollections I have of the following civil cases:

a. Aslam Ramtoola
b. Anonymity Order
c. Kevin Palmer
d. Rachel Williams
e. Frank Holt
f. Susan McKnight
g. Tracey Etheridge
h. Katherine Mc Alerny
i. Keith Macaldowie
j. Julie Wolstenhome

92. I do not recognise any of these names and have no recollection of any of the civil cases.

93. I can confirm that I was not involved in any civil actions besides Mr Castleton's case.
